title: rubus carneus
intro: Rubus carneus is a type of bramble or wild rose, a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus carneus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus carneus typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems to make teas, tinctures, or capsules that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
